_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Liaise with regulatory and accrediting bodies.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, binding corporate rules, and other cross-border data transfer mechanisms, ensuring compliance with applicable jurisdictional requirements and supervisory guidance.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.518), RC-A-003 (RC, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.369). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [accrediting, bodies, liaise, regulatory] vs WIDAI-only terms [advising, agreements, applicable, binding, border, clauses] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.864, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 28-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:46.8%, N:53.2%, C:0.0%). No dominant classification for "Liaise with regulatory and accrediting bodies." vs "Skill in advising on data processing agreements, standard contractual clauses, b" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.521 > STS 0.369 (gap +0.152). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [accrediting, bodies, liaise, regulatory]. WIDAI terms: [advising, agreements, applicable, binding, border, clauses].
